summary: VitalFlow B2B Panel Improvements - All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (add-employee, export-pdf, team-overview with period filters, security 403 for non-Gestor). Frontend: 18/18 tests passed (B2B button with correct href/target, Painel RH button, Add Employee modal with all fields, period filter buttons, PDF export button, security redirect for non-Gestor users).

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 or 0 - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly after initial load

backend: POST /api/dashboard/add-employee - Gestor can add employee, returns temp_password
POST /api/dashboard/add-employee - Returns 400 for missing required fields (nome, email)
GET /api/dashboard/export-pdf?period=7d - Returns real PDF (application/pdf, starts with %PDF)
GET /api/dashboard/team-overview - Returns team overview with correct structure
All B2B endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
frontend: Navbar: 'Acessar Painel B2B' button visible for Gestor (data-testid='b2b-panel-button')
Navbar: B2B button has correct href='https://vitalflow.ia.br/gestor'
Navbar: B2B button opens in new tab (target='_blank')
Navbar: B2B button text shows 'Acessar Painel B2B'
Navbar: 'Painel RH' button visible for Gestor (data-testid='gestor-dashboard-button')
GestorDashboard: Period 7d button visible with text '7 dias'
GestorDashboard: Period 30d button visible with text '30 dias'
GestorDashboard: Period 6m button visible with text '6 meses'
GestorDashboard: Period filter 30d becomes active when clicked (bg-cyan-500)
security: Non-Gestor user: B2B Panel button correctly hidden
Non-Gestor user: Painel RH button correctly hidden
Non-Gestor user: Redirected from /gestor to / (GestorRoute working)

seed_data_creation: Created test employees via add-employee endpoint during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow B2B Panel improvements fully tested. Key features verified: (1) 'Acessar Painel B2B' button in Navbar for Gestor users with href='https://vitalflow.ia.br/gestor' and target='_blank', (2) GestorDashboard has 'Adicionar Funcionário' modal with name/email/setor/cargo fields, (3) 'Exportar Relatório PDF' returns real PDF via reportlab (application/pdf content type), (4) Date filters (7d/30d/6m) work and trigger re-fetch, (5) Security: non-Gestor users redirected from /gestor to / via GestorRoute component.
mocked_apis: POST /api/wearables/oauth/callback (simulated OAuth - no real Google Fit/Apple HealthKit)

feature_1.name: B2B Panel Button in Navbar
feature_1.details: 'Acessar Painel B2B' button visible for Gestor, href='https://vitalflow.ia.br/gestor', target='_blank'

feature_2.name: Add Employee Modal
feature_2.details: Modal opens with name/email/setor/cargo fields, backend creates user with temp_password

feature_3.name: Export PDF (reportlab)
feature_3.details: Returns real PDF (application/pdf), starts with %PDF, accepts period params (7d/30d/6m)

feature_4.name: Date Filters
feature_4.details: 7 dias, 30 dias, 6 meses buttons visible and functional, trigger team-overview re-fetch

feature_5.name: Security - GestorRoute
feature_5.details: Non-Gestor users redirected from /gestor to /, B2B/Painel RH buttons hidden
